steps.t: You should collect honey to present to the Beornings as a gift.
You should travel due south of Radagast, in Thornholt, to Skoghús, the Beorning camp.
Threkmóth can be found in Skoghús, deep in the Thornholt woods. You should introduce yourself to Threkmóth, the leader of the Beorning settlement, and…
You should go speak with Vaskorn, who can be found in Threkmóth, deep in the Thornholt woods.
